Types

Styler = ref object

proc addCmd(s: Styler; cmd: TerminalCmd) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    forbids: [].}

    forbids: [].}

proc show(s: Styler) {....raises: [IOError], tags: [WriteIOEffect, RootEffect],
                       forbids: [].}
proc update(s: Styler; index: int; color: BackgroundColor) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc update(s: Styler; index: int; color: Color) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}

    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc update(s: Styler; index: int; str: string) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc update(s: Styler; index: int; style: set[Style]) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc update(s: Styler; index: int; style: Style) {....raises: [], tags: [],
